301.name: Hippo Teeth
301.desc: Gain 1 health when you deal damage.

306.name: Famine
306.desc: 10% chance to spawn a Fly when you take damage.

307.name: Alien Chomp
307.desc: Your basic attack has a 1% chance to instakill.

309.name: Jacko
309.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Fear.

312.name: Bear Trap Mouth
312.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Immobile if it's melee.

313.name: Full Mouth
313.desc: At the end of each round, spit at an enemy .

315.name: Double Mouth
315.desc: 10% chance to gain a bonus attack each turn.

317.name: Glass Teeth
317.desc: Spawn glass when you take damage. +1 Bleed Thorns.

319.name: Catfish Mouth
319.desc: Water does not slow movement. +1 Health Regeneration while wet.

326.name: Double Mouth 2
326.desc: Gain +1 Health Regeneration whenever you eat food.

327.name: Clown Lips
327.desc: You can reroll your options when you level up.

328.name: Bandage Mouth
328.desc: Can't eat food, use consumables, or use musical abilities. +2 Health Regeneration

750.name: beaver teeth
750.desc: Your basic attack destroys inanimate objects and turns tiles into dirt.

752.name: Dog tongue
752.desc: Your basic attack creates water tiles.

754.name: Isaacs mouth
754.desc: Adjacent units get All Stats Down.

760.name: bigfoot mouth
760.desc: When a food pickup spawns within 2 tiles of you, move to it.

900.name: Slender
900.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Fear.

1026.name: spider mouth
1026.desc: Your basic attack has a 10% chance to inflict Webbed.

-2.name: no mouth (frame 702)
-2.desc: Can't eat food, use consumables, or use musical abilities.

705.name: Fetus Mouth
705.desc: Your basic attack can be used two extra times each turn but is replaced with a 1-damage spit attack.
